recommendations: Add action-diversity checks before repeating the same primitive action family.
Ensure each long-horizon run logs typed memory reads and reusable memory writes.
Record explicit world-model cells, resources, and frontiers during autonomous runs.
Route repeated failed action patterns through action-abstraction and self-evolution reports.
Run bounded-context-report and replace oversized/raw planner context with typed retrieval.
Trigger self-evolution or curriculum repair when progress disappears in the back half of a run.
Use verifier-backed subgoals and curriculum fallback when no goal completes.

policy_hints.reason: session traces show little new world-state or object knowledge
agent repeats too few action types or touches too few object targets
planning traces lack enough read/write evidence for test-time learning
planner cycles contain missing, oversized, or raw-context memory contracts
progress signals end too early or goals do not complete
